response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document misrepresents Illinois tenant law by claiming tenants have no right to cure and must vacate within 5 days without court proceedings, contradicting actual Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act protections that provide cure rights and court-ordered eviction procedures.
